title: Take a Walk | #shorts
full_text: Mom, I'm tired. I'm going to go for a walk by myself outside. >> You Why are you going by yourself? I'll come with you. >> No, I just want to go alone. >> No. Why would you have to go alone? You don't need to go alone. Every time you go alone anywhere, that's where the problem start. Your mind starts going into I should be doing this and I need this and D. You don't need that. I will go with you and we will talk it out. >> No, I'm going to go to work by myself. >> No, absolutely not. I know where all the problems in this community are starting. Everybody's walking by themselves. >> I'm not the one who needs a walk. I'm totally fine.
